title: Chestnut Stir Fry
description: A simple and flavorful vegetarian dish made with roasted chestnuts and stir fried with your choice of vegetables. Serve hot and enjoy!
instructions: 1. Soak the sliced chestnuts in water for at least 30 minutes.
2. Preheat your oven to 400°F (200°C) and roast the chestnuts for 20-25 minutes, or until tender.
3. In a large pan or wok, heat the vegetable oil over medium-high heat.
4. Add the sliced onion and stir-fry until translucent, about 3-4 minutes.
5. Add the roasted chestnuts and stir-fry for another 2-3 minutes.
6. Season with smoked paprika and soy sauce to taste.
